Mithril Boots  
 


Slot: FEET
AC: 30
STR: +5 STA: +15 HP: +50
SV MAGIC: +15
WT: 3.7 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Mithril Boots

Slot: FEET
AC: 30
STR: +5 STA: +15 HP: +50
SV MAGIC: +15
WT: 3.7 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):180, 180, 250
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:10 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:14504

Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:10:49
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55

# Apr 27 2004 at 10:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591804024399
View User Forum
27 posts
So sorry Aalexander, but it is Vis Maior, with an I. I've been running around quellious long enough to know that.

Look closer

PWNED!

Medeec, 49 cleric
Hodash, 55 warrior
quellious server
Magi Discordia
▲ Page top
planar and velious armors
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 10:29 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The iksar PoH/PoF planar isnt only fairly common, its really a lot more uber than the comparison armors that drop for non iksar in planes...too bad they didnt make iksar monk/necro armors, since the originals arent so hot in the first place. That would make no sense, but at least monks would have some alright planar.
Ive seen quite a bit of the stuff drop, the shaman armor is noticeably better than the non iksar equivalent. 3 pieces of rune etched give +wis, and not that much except on BP maybe. The scaled heirophants armor( i think thats what its called) has wis on all but one piece of the armor, the legs, which happen to give 40 mana and + to saves. Of course, iksar get the shaft armorwise almost everywhere else, but they can wear a good deal of the velious armors, including RFV, pog/thurg/kael/SS, almost all the armor from ToV, WW armor(worked-matchless dragon stuff), barbed/bloodruned/ cold steel from velks, rygorr( i know, crap, but still), gladiator chain off mobs in kael( gettin kinda obscure now, running out of ideas), thats all i can think of right now, but thats a lot.
▲ Page top
Twinked
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 4:10 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
These boots are totally for druids. I should know since i bought all my characters on E-Bay. The strength and stamina are Ubar, and the weight is perfect for a druid. Gratz to Verant for making a kick *** pair of boots specifically for druids!

After killing Lady Mirenilla:

Lady Mirenilla's corpse shouts, 'Ahhh!! you have defeated me...but please...don't give my boots to any iksar!...they got stinky feet!..ohhhh..*"

And so it became law...

Just a Quick note:

# Oct 23 2001 at 1:36 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770316000
1 post
It's Vis Maior. Not Vis Major. Just thought i'd let you know. Running around in Quellious i see them every once in a while and even in game it is hard to tell, but nonetheless, it is an "I" not a "J".
▲ Page top
RE: Just a Quick note:

# Dec 12 2001 at 8:26 AM Rating: Decent
